governed_install_requirements: Tool Universe Resolver must classify action as scanner_adapter_install_or_scan
BTS tool evaluation and selection must pass
pre_tool_action_gate must allow package installation or scanner invocation
install/smoke receipt must capture command, version, exit code, stdout/stderr excerpt, and source hash
scanner output must be normalized into CDR_LINT_SECURITY_SCANNER_PACKET_SCHEMA_v1-compatible evidence
fallback scanner baseline remains mandatory when real scanner is unavailable

profiles.official_basis: Ruff is available as ruff on PyPI and can be installed with uv, pip, pipx, Homebrew, conda, or standalone installers.
Bandit is the Python security linter profile used for code-level security scanning; install only through governed profile when network/package manager is available.
Semgrep CLI supports scan/ci commands, JSON/SARIF/JUnit output, config selection, exit codes, and metrics controls.
profiles.purpose: multi-language semantic/static security and pattern scanning

rationale: Stage 9 proved deterministic stdlib fallback. Stage 10 adds governed real-scanner adapter/install profiles so future environments can upgrade to ruff/bandit/semgrep without bypassing CDR or BTS.
